subcodes.first_line: My remembrance be upon him who hath turned unto My Kingdom and hearkened unto My Call, responding through a grace bestowed by Me - for verily I am the Answerer - and hath attained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکری من اقبل الی ملکوتی و سمع ندائی و اجاب فضلا من عندی و انا لمجیب قد فاز
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @consolation and comfort, @call to action
